DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow… So many glittering stories here. I’ll perch on the windowsill and browse—maybe I’ll find a scrap of legend.
DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.ancien: Of course! While you wait, pick a forgotten gem to pass the time!
DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1-0r.ancie: Still waiting? I’m not in a rush—take your pick. You can afford to wait, and so can I!
DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.ancien: I have countless gems here, but I don’t see the one you’re waiting for…
DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char:
I’m not looking for a gem. I’m looking for a story worth singing about. Have you seen one?
[i][font_size=22]The strings tremble once, then fall silent. [/font_size][/i]
DARV.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.ancien: …Never mind. Save your choice for next time. Seems you’re used to waiting a long time.
NEOW.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow… Your whisper has interrupted my nap again. Where shall my song drift this time, to some untold legend?
NEOW.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char: Meow… If you would grant me anything… grant me a story worth telling. The words are ready—I only lack a melody.
NEOW.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.ancien:
[sine]…Go…
…I’ll still… be here… where you… turned back……[/sine]
NONUPEIPE.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.c: Meow… What a splendid stage. Yet I’m just an unfinished manuscript, blown into a corner.
NONUPEIPE.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.a: Oh dear, even an old coat can shine with my blessing!
Waiting for a victory that’s late? Come, let me dress you more like a winner.
NONUPEIPE.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.a: Even if you tether yourself to a moment that never comes, you needn’t look so drab.
NONUPEIPE.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.c: Meow… I don’t need to look good. I only need someone left to hear me finish this song.
NONUPEIPE.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.a: How dull. Take it. Let me watch you keep waiting—wearing my light and your patience.
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow! You’re dancing, I’m playing. Which of us is more like an unfinished rhapsody?
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.anci: Neither is crazy!! Neither is crazy!! Try this to kill time!!
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1-0r.anc: Don’t rush don’t rush! No need to hurry! Waiting is… is… a very long lightning bolt!!
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.anci: I’ll give you something!! What do you want? The sound of “it’ll ring again tomorrow”!?
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char: Meow… I’ve put a new interlude in my pocket. Want to hear it?
OROBAS.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.anci: Good! Good! Then it’s settled: I keep making noise, you keep waiting!!
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow… Your snoring matches the rhythm of my strings. Doze in your tide, and legends will come knocking.
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.ancien: [thinky_dots]Restless traveler… take a piece of me… find peace in the tide……[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1-0r.ancie: [thinky_dots]The waking always hurry… only the sleeping know how to stay… rest a while too……[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.ancien: [thinky_dots]Take my flesh… flesh that “won’t rush you”……[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char: Meow… I’m not afraid of pain. I’m afraid it’ll cut off the chorus I’m in the middle of singing.
PAEL.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.ancien: [thinky_dots]Take it… so you can stay right here… waiting for the road that hasn’t come……[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow… You want to fight. I need to write. Can we… just do our own thing?
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.ancien: [b]No way!! Take this weapon! Go get stronger!!![/b]
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1-0r.ancie: [b]Your blood’s gone cold! But battle can make even patience boil!![/b]
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.ancien: [b]Stop waiting for that person! Fight me—that’s your destiny now!![/b]
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char:
Meow… If I must fight—I suppose I know a little sword dance.
[i][font_size=22]The bard rests a hand on the hilt, the other still touching the strings. [/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.ancien: [b]Fine!! Take this weapon and go fight!![/b]
TEZCATARA.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.c: Meow… The fire flickers like the prelude to a song. But I’m not waiting for warmth—I’m waiting for someone to say “en core.”
TEZCATARA.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.a: It’s not time yet, but that’s fine! Come in, let me [jitter][b]warm[/b][/jitter] you up while you wait.
Is the only luggage you’re carrying your [jitter][b]hesitation[/b][/jitter]? Want me to burn it away?
TEZCATARA.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.a: Darling, try some [jitter][b]pastries[/b][/jitter] I made for you. The kind that cool slowly—the kind you wait for.
TEZCATARA.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.c: Meow… I’m not hungry. Just carrying an unfinished melody in my chest. An empty score and an empty bowl look the same.
TEZCATARA.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.a: Fine, have a taste. Then we’ll keep waiting—until the bitterness [jitter][b]fades[/b][/jitter].
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-0.char: Meow… Even demons do business. What do you want from me? My songs? They were never mine—I just take dictation from the passing wind.
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0-1.ancie: The worthless [sine]time[/sine] you’ve hoarded… it adds up rather nicely……
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1-0r.anci: I usually sell “right now” at a premium. But with you—I’d even mark up “some day.”
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-0.ancie: If I wrote a tiny clause at the bottom: you’re allowed to [sine]wait forever[/sine]—would you sign?
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-1.char: Meow… My name doesn’t matter—call me anything. What matters is that the one who claps when I finish singing hasn’t come yet.
VAKUU.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2-2.ancie: Take your price. I will never wake you—unless [sine]that moment[/sine] truly arrives.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.0: You stand here, yet you’re nowhere. What are you waiting for? The spire’s peak? The ending? Permission?
Meow… I’m waiting for a story worth singing into an epic. Surely there’s one in the tower?
Permission? You never needed it. You’re just afraid of “waiting for the wrong thing.”
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.1: You’re back. Time for you is a hallway—you never finish walking it because you don’t want to.
Meow… Hallways are nice. They echo. A song can live years in an echo. The end… the end has no more stories to collect.
Foolish. If you never reach the end, you’ll always just be an echo.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BARD_CHARACTER_BARD.2: Then stay standing. The tower will remember: you came, many times, and took nothing.
Meow… If I take a melody… would I stop waiting?
Yes. So don’t take it. Keep waiting—it’s the only weapon you’re good at.
